title: The RealReal's AI-Powered Profitability Inflection: From Burn to Earn in Luxury Resale
text: The RealReal is experiencing a profitability inflection driven by AI-powered operational improvements and growing scale in the expanding luxury resale market. The company achieved positive adjusted EBITDA milestones in Q4 2023 (first profitable quarter since IPO), and has sustained profitability momentum through 2024 and into 2026. Q1 2026 adjusted EBITDA of $13.1 million (6.9% margin) demonstrates the sustainability of the earnings inflection. The Athena AI system has been central to achieving this inflection, automating repetitive tasks in authentication and cataloging while freeing experts to focus on complex items. Processing cost per unit has declined significantly as Athena adoption has increased from 27% of items in Q3 2025 to 35% by year-end 2025. Management targets 50% Athena processing by year-end 2026. Key inflection drivers: (1) revenue growth (19% in Q1) from supply unlocking initiatives and higher-value transaction growth, (2) operating leverage from fixed cost absorption over growing revenue base, (3) variable cost reduction from AI automation and process improvements. Average order value growth of 15% indicates the company's ability to drive pricing power and transaction value through premium positioning. The company's path to sustained high-single-digit to low-double-digit EBITDA margins (8% guidance 2026) represents a fundamental business model transformation from unprofitable growth to profitable, sustainable expansion.
